title: Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup

seo.title: How to Make Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup — Easy Turkish Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup. This easy Turkish recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

easy Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup recipe
authentic Turkish Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Turkish Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup — a beloved Turkish classic

description: Mercimek Corbasi, a beloved Turkish red lentil soup, is a staple in every Turkish home, offering warmth and comfort with its rich, velvety texture. This nutritious and flavorful soup is incredibly easy to prepare, making it perfect for a quick weeknight meal or a comforting starter. The vibrant red lentils, aromatic vegetables, and a hint of mint create a truly unforgettable culinary experience.

instructions.title: Prepare Lentils and Aromatics
instructions.text: Rinse the red lentils thoroughly under cold running water until the water runs clear. In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the finely chopped onion and sauté until softened and translucent, about 5-7 minutes.

instructions.title: Build the Flavor Base
instructions.text: Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for another minute until fragrant. Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, to deepen its flavor and color. Be careful not to burn it.

instructions.title: Combine and Simmer
instructions.text: Add the rinsed lentils to the pot, stirring to combine them with the onion and tomato paste mixture. Pour in 6 cups of water or vegetable broth. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and let it simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are very tender.

instructions.title: Season and Blend
instructions.text: Once the lentils are tender, remove the pot from the heat. Stir in the dried mint, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Using an immersion blender, blend the soup directly in the pot until it is smooth and creamy. If you dont have an immersion blender, carefully transfer the soup to a regular blender and blend in batches, then return to the pot. If the soup is too thick, add the remaining 1 cup of water or broth until it reaches your desired consistency.

instructions.title: Prepare the Butter Topping
instructions.text: In a small pan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Once the butter is melted and slightly foamy, add an additional pinch of dried mint and red pepper flakes. Swirl for about 30 seconds until fragrant, being careful not to burn the spices.

instructions.title: Serve Mercimek Corbasi
instructions.text: Ladle the hot Mercimek Corbasi into individual bowls. Drizzle a spoonful of the melted spiced butter over each serving. Serve immediately with fresh lemon wedges on the side for squeezing, which adds a wonderful brightness to the soup.

tips: Always rinse your red lentils thoroughly before cooking to remove any dust or impurities and prevent the soup from becoming cloudy.
For an extra layer of flavor, use homemade chicken or vegetable broth instead of water. A good quality Turkish tomato paste (salca) will also make a noticeable difference.
The traditional butter and spice topping (nane-pul biberli yag) is crucial for an authentic taste. Dont skip it, and serve with fresh lemon wedges for a bright finish.
article: Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup is a beloved Turkish Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
